title: barach #1272
definition:
1) to go through, flee, run away, chase, drive away, put to flight,
    reach, shoot (extend), hurry away
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to go, pass through
        1a2) to flee
        1a3) to hasten, come quickly
    1b) (Hiphil)
        1b1) to pass through
        1b2) to cause to flee, put to flight
        1b3) to drive away
nasbUsage:

    NASB:  to go through, flee
